name: slice_fast
description: Slice tool (mesh.sliceTool) S1 `fast` preview-gate parity: the SAME mid-plane cube cut driven with fast=false (live preview during drag) and fast=true (cut deferred to mouse-up) must commit the IDENTICAL geometry (12v/10f, one index-shared crossing vertex per straddled edge). Both cases assert the same frozen golden, proving the committed geometry is fast-independent through the HTTP command path. Analytic self-golden (Mesh.cutByPlane is connectivity-correct by construction).
source: Analytic. Cube +/-0.5; line along Z through origin -> plane normal ||X (X=0); new verts are edge midpoints (t=0.5). Same golden as slice.json case midX.
